description: Epic container for Milestone 3 of the Streaming Text Rendering project. Covers scroll lock with useLayoutEffect and CSS streaming cursor. Scroll lock is independent; cursor depends on segment memoization.
title: Epic: Polish — Scroll Lock & Streaming Cursor
